title: After the Debut: The Lingering Scent of Turf

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
This superbly talented Umamusume has claimed
first place in her debut race! What a bold
performance right from the get-go!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(I can still feel it—the intensity of those final
moments, the rush of crossing the finish line...)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Aha... Ahaha! So this is what a race is like! This is
how the turf feels under my feet!

text_block_list.name: Ines's Little Sisters
text_block_list.text: Hey, big sis! You were incredible!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Cassie! Polly!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Did you... see that? I gave it all I had...

text_block_list.name: Ines's Little Sisters
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! It was so exciting!
Ooooh! We still kinda feel...

text_block_list.name: Ines's Little Sisters
text_block_list.text: Amaaazing!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hehe, no doubt! Huff... I feel the... same!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: (I mean, my heart is still pounding like crazy!)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(I wouldn't be surprised if the people around me
could hear it beating...)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(It feels just like the day when I first experienced
that feeling.)

text_block_list.name: Umamusume on TV
text_block_list.text:
"Since I was born an Umamusume, I always felt it
was my calling to become a Derby champion."

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I still remember it so clearly—I was doing laundry,
and I'd just finished hanging up my sister's hoodie
to dry when I saw the Japanese Derby broadcast
live on TV.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Despite being covered in mud, the Derby
champion was smiling happily amidst the
thunderous applause.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I remember the hanger in my hand making a clang
as it hit the floor.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
After the broadcast was over, I rushed over to a
nearby secondhand bookstore.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I picked up a magazine I'd had my eye on for a
while—the Derby special feature issue.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
And just like that, I stood there reading it until
the sun went down, my heart thumping noisily the
whole time.

text_block_list.name: Interview Transcript
text_block_list.text:
"For us Umamusume, there's one title that we all
dream of acquiring."

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I've never forgotten those words...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Not even once, since the day I read them!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Once the race is over, we see Ines Fujin's little
sisters off before making our way back to the
academy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thoughts begin roaming around in my head as I
consider which Open race we should enter next
based on her performance today.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Trainer! I want to take on the Derby!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
That's right! I want to win the Derby! I want to
feel all the excitement that comes with competing
on that grand stage!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
It's something all Umamusume dream of, and I'm
no exception. I'm going to enter it...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: And I'm going to win!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her keen enthusiasm takes me by surprise.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In stark contrast to the soft warmth she had
radiated previously, her eyes now appear to be
burning with a fierce intensity.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Tell me, Trainer—how can I reach that point?
What is it that I need?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The things she lacks, first and foremost, are
experience and racing instinct.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The quickest way to establish those qualities
would be to have her compete in a G1 race where
Umamusume vie for the title of junior champion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For example, a race like the Asahi Hai Futurity
Stakes...
choice_data_list:
(...Can we really aim for a G1 race right off the
bat?)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm a newbie trainer, and she's an Umamusume
who only just made her debut.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Junior year G1 races are filled with Umamusume
who boast incredible innate talent. And many
have been honing their skills since a young age.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Considering our current level, it might be an
overly ambitious goal.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Which race should I enter next?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, I need to meet her determined gaze
with a direct challenge.
choice_data_list:
Want to shoot for the Asahi Hai Futurity
Stakes?

Want to shoot for the Asahi Hai Futurity
Stakes?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Gotcha! The Asahi Hai Futurity Stakes it is! We'd
better start preparing right away!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Upon hearing her response, I steel my own
resolve.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Asahi Hai Futurity Stakes is a 1,600-meter
race on turf, where competitors vie for the title of
junior year champion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We'll use it as a stepping stone on her way to the
winning the Derby.
